changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, sort_order, is_active, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.id, '5', 't', now() FROM clinlims.test t JOIN clinlims.dictionary d ON d.dict_entry = 'Absence' WHERE t.name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test_result tr WHERE tr.test_id = t.id AND tr.value = d.id::text AND tr.tst_rslt_type = 'D' );
